name: OpenThread-Border-Router
description: OpenThread Border Router connects a Thread network to your LAN. Enables Matter-over-Thread smart home devices. Supports network-attached Thread radios (e.g. SMLIGHT SLZB) via TCP and local USB sticks.

paths.name: Thread Data
paths.description: Persistent Thread network dataset and state. Essential for maintaining the Thread mesh across restarts.

ports.name: REST API
ports.description: OTBR REST API port. Used by Home Assistant OpenThread Border Router integration to manage the Thread network.

ports.name: Web UI
ports.description: Optional OTBR web interface for monitoring and managing the Thread network.

variables.name: Thread Radio Host
variables.description: Hostname or IP of your Thread radio device (e.g. 192.168.1.15 for SMLIGHT SLZB). Required for network-attached radios.

variables.name: Thread Radio Port
variables.description: Port of your Thread radio device. 7638 for SMLIGHT SLZB MR-series (Radio 2), 6638 for SLZB-06 series.

variables.name: Radio Baud Rate
variables.description: Communication baud rate for the radio. Default 460800 is maximum. Reduce by factors of 2 or 4 for increased stability (e.g. 230400, 115200).

variables.name: REST API Port
variables.description: Port for OTBR REST API. Home Assistant integration connects to this port.

variables.name: Web Interface
variables.description: Enable OTBR web interface on port 8080. Set to 1 to enable, 0 to disable.

variables.name: Web Interface Port
variables.description: Port for OTBR web interface. Only used if OTBR_WEB_ENABLE is set to 1.

variables.name: Thread Interface
variables.description: TUN device created and used by OTBR. Change only if running multiple OTBR instances.

variables.name: Backbone Interface
variables.description: Host network interface for LAN connectivity. Common values: eth0, end0, wlan0.

variables.name: Use TCP Radio
variables.description: Set to 1 for network-attached radios (TCP), 0 for local USB-attached Thread sticks.

variables.name: Flow Control
variables.description: RCP arguments for OTBR agent. Default enables flow control. Remove '&uart-flow-control' if your radio doesn't support it.
